fields.title: Public School Renovation & Expansion
fields.description: Renovation of existing facilities and construction of new wings for a public elementary school, including modern classrooms and playground.

fields.title: National Highway Resurfacing
fields.description: Comprehensive resurfacing of 50km of the main national highway, including drainage improvements and road markings.

fields.title: Regional Hospital Electrical Upgrade
fields.description: Complete overhaul of the electrical grid for the regional hospital to support new MRI and intensive care units.

fields.title: Municipal Water Supply Extension
fields.description: Extension of the municipal water supply lines to newly developed residential areas, including pumping stations.

fields.title: University Library Construction
fields.description: Construction of a new 3-story modern library complex for the university campus.

fields.title: Solar Farm Installation
fields.description: Installation of a 5MW solar farm to supplement the national grid in the northern sector.

fields.title: Construction of 50-Bed District Hospital
fields.description:
Procuring Entity: Ministry of Health, Ghana

Scope of Work: Full structural construction, plumbing, electrical wiring, and landscaping for a modern 50-bed healthcare facility. Includes the construction of an administrative block, OPD, surgical theater, and a small staff quarters.

fields.title: Supply and Installation of Enterprise Server Infrastructure
fields.description:
Procuring Entity: National Identification Authority (NIA)

Scope of Work: Procurement, delivery, and installation of 15 high-performance enterprise blade servers, UPS backup systems, and associated networking switches. The winning contractor must provide a 2-year warranty and quarterly maintenance.

fields.title: Rehabilitation and Tarring of Feeder Roads (25km)
fields.description:
Procuring Entity: Department of Feeder Roads

Scope of Work: Grading, base laying, and bitumen surfacing of 25 kilometers of rural feeder roads to facilitate the transportation of agricultural produce. Includes the construction of 4 concrete culverts for drainage.

fields.title: Procurement of 30 Heavy-Duty Agricultural Tractors
fields.description:
Procuring Entity: Ministry of Food and Agriculture

Scope of Work: Supply and delivery of 30 brand-new 75HP 4WD agricultural tractors with matching implements, including ploughs and harrows. Supplier must offer operator training and an initial supply of fast-moving spare parts.

fields.title: Annual Security and Janitorial Services Contract
fields.description:
Procuring Entity: Ghana Revenue Authority (GRA)

Scope of Work: Provision of 24/7 armed and unarmed security personnel, comprehensive CCTV monitoring, and daily janitorial/cleaning services for a 10-story corporate headquarters complex. Contract duration is 24 months, renewable based on performance.

fields.title: Off-Grid Solar Power Electrification for Rural Schools
fields.description:
Procuring Entity: Ministry of Education

Scope of Work: Design, supply, and installation of 10kW off-grid solar PV systems complete with lithium-ion battery storage banks for 15 selected rural basic schools. The project includes wiring the classrooms and installing energy-efficient LED lighting.
fields.location: Various districts in the Upper West Region
